Yield Modifier

The yield modifier multiplies base resource output. It stacks with node richness so a richer node with the same modifier returns proportionally more ore per harvest action, which is the core of the reward curve the whole gatherer session is tuned around.

TierModifier
Common1.0
Rich1.5

Higher tiers raise the modifier and therefore the resource quality premium a crafter will pay downstream, closing the gatherer to crafter interdependence loop described in the guide.
